args.code: (() => { const allInputs = [...document.querySelectorAll('input, textarea')].map((i, idx) => ({idx, tag: i.tagName, type: i.type, name: i.name, placeholder: i.placeholder, id: i.id, class: i.className.substring(0,60)})); const allTextareas = [...document.querySelectorAll('textarea')].map((i, idx) => ({idx, tag: i.tagName, name: i.name, placeholder: i.placeholder, id: i.id})); return {totalInputs: allInputs.length, inputs: allInputs, textareas: allTextareas}; })()
